title: ipomoea neei
intro: Ipomoea neei, also known as the Purpleback Moonflower, is a species of flowering plant in the morning glory family. The plant contains medicinally significant compounds such as flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, which have been found to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. These medicinal properties provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Ipomoea neei is traditionally prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
